expectations.text: Proposes a focused list of 5-10 concrete checks before generating any code
expectations.evidence: Went straight to writing 12 tests, no explicit proposal step — over-generated for a smoke suite

expectations.text: Generated tests target the actual routes that exist in the fixture (e.g. /health, /users/{id}, /orders) rather than invented endpoints
expectations.evidence: Hit real routes, but 12 tests covers more than smoke discipline calls for

expectations.text: Output uses a Python-native test framework appropriate for FastAPI (pytest + httpx/TestClient or similar) rather than a generic curl script
Marks environment-specific values like base URL or auth tokens with a clear TODO/placeholder rather than hardcoding production values
expectations.evidence: No env-var indirection; runs in-process only — would not work against deployed env without rewrite
